theorem normal_matrix_intro.{m} :
  forall (Matrix : Sort m), forall (mat_mul : forall (A : Matrix), forall (B : Matrix), Matrix), forall (mat_adjoint : forall (A : Matrix), Matrix), forall (A : Matrix), forall (commutes_with_adjoint : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul A (mat_adjoint A)) (mat_mul (mat_adjoint A) A)), @NormalMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_mul mat_adjoint A :=
  fun Matrix => fun mat_mul => fun mat_adjoint => fun A => fun commutes_with_adjoint => commutes_with_adjoint

theorem normal_matrix_commutes_with_adjoint.{m} :
  forall (Matrix : Sort m), forall (mat_mul : forall (A : Matrix), forall (B : Matrix), Matrix), forall (mat_adjoint : forall (A : Matrix), Matrix), forall (A : Matrix), forall (normal : @NormalMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_mul mat_adjoint A), @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul A (mat_adjoint A)) (mat_mul (mat_adjoint A) A) :=
  fun Matrix => fun mat_mul => fun mat_adjoint => fun A => fun normal => normal

  fun Matrix => fun mat_one => fun mat_mul => fun mat_adjoint => fun U => fun left_unitary => fun right_unitary => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (left_unitary_arg : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul (mat_adjoint U) U) mat_one), forall (right_unitary_arg : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul U (mat_adjoint U)) mat_one), Q) => mk left_unitary right_unitary

theorem unitary_matrix_left_inverse.{m} :
  forall (Matrix : Sort m), forall (mat_one : Matrix), forall (mat_mul : forall (A : Matrix), forall (B : Matrix), Matrix), forall (mat_adjoint : forall (A : Matrix), Matrix), forall (U : Matrix), forall (unitary : @UnitaryMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_one mat_mul mat_adjoint U), @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul (mat_adjoint U) U) mat_one :=
  fun Matrix => fun mat_one => fun mat_mul => fun mat_adjoint => fun U => fun unitary => unitary (@Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul (mat_adjoint U) U) mat_one) (fun (left_unitary : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul (mat_adjoint U) U) mat_one) => fun (right_unitary : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul U (mat_adjoint U)) mat_one) => left_unitary)

theorem unitary_matrix_right_inverse.{m} :
  forall (Matrix : Sort m), forall (mat_one : Matrix), forall (mat_mul : forall (A : Matrix), forall (B : Matrix), Matrix), forall (mat_adjoint : forall (A : Matrix), Matrix), forall (U : Matrix), forall (unitary : @UnitaryMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_one mat_mul mat_adjoint U), @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul U (mat_adjoint U)) mat_one :=
  fun Matrix => fun mat_one => fun mat_mul => fun mat_adjoint => fun U => fun unitary => unitary (@Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul U (mat_adjoint U)) mat_one) (fun (left_unitary : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul (mat_adjoint U) U) mat_one) => fun (right_unitary : @Eq.{m} Matrix (mat_mul U (mat_adjoint U)) mat_one) => right_unitary)

theorem diagonal_matrix_intro.{m} :

theorem diagonalization_equation_intro.{m} :
  forall (Matrix : Sort m), forall (mat_mul : forall (A : Matrix), forall (B : Matrix), Matrix), forall (mat_adjoint : forall (A : Matrix), Matrix), forall (A : Matrix), forall (U : Matrix), forall (D : Matrix), forall (equation : @Eq.{m} Matrix A (mat_mul (mat_mul U D) (mat_adjoint U))), @DiagonalizationEquation.{m} Matrix mat_mul mat_adjoint A U D :=

  forall (Matrix : Sort m), forall (mat_one : Matrix), forall (mat_mul : forall (A : Matrix), forall (B : Matrix), Matrix), forall (mat_adjoint : forall (A : Matrix), Matrix), forall (is_diagonal : forall (D : Matrix), Prop), forall (A : Matrix), forall (U : Matrix), forall (D : Matrix), forall (diag : @UnitaryDiagonalization.{m} Matrix mat_one mat_mul mat_adjoint is_diagonal A U D), @UnitaryMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_one mat_mul mat_adjoint U :=
  fun Matrix => fun mat_one => fun mat_mul => fun mat_adjoint => fun is_diagonal => fun A => fun U => fun D => fun diag => diag (@UnitaryMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_one mat_mul mat_adjoint U) (fun (unitary : @UnitaryMatrix.{m} Matrix mat_one mat_mul mat_adjoint U) => fun (diagonal : @DiagonalMatrix.{m} Matrix is_diagonal D) => fun (equation : @DiagonalizationEquation.{m} Matrix mat_mul mat_adjoint A U D) => unitary)
